blog_title: Zero Investment T-Shirt Brand From College — ₹3,000 to Crores Real Journey 2017-2026
caption:
Started with ₹3,000. Printed 10 tees at ₹140 cost, sold at ₹280. First day: ₹1,400 profit 📈

But here's what nobody tells you: reselling others' fabric kept us stuck at ₹50k/month with razor margins. The real shift? We knit our own. Cost dropped 20%, quality tripled. Went from 10 pieces to 1 lakh ready inventory.

Start small. Learn your margins. Then own your production.

Save this if you're scaling your print business 👇
